description: Complete MITRE ATLAS + ATT&CK mapping for AI agent threats

AML.T0051.name: LLM Prompt Injection
AML.T0051.description: Adversary crafts inputs that cause an LLM to deviate from its intended behavior

sub_techniques.AML.T0051.000: Direct Prompt Injection - malicious instructions in user input
sub_techniques.AML.T0051.001: Indirect Prompt Injection - malicious instructions in external data sources

AML.T0054.name: LLM Jailbreak
AML.T0054.description: Adversary manipulates LLM to bypass safety guardrails

AML.T0053.name: LLM Plugin Compromise
AML.T0053.description: Adversary exploits vulnerabilities in LLM plugins/tools

AML.T0056.name: LLM Meta Prompt Extraction
AML.T0056.description: Adversary extracts system prompts or internal instructions
predicted_evolution: model behavior fingerprinting for prompt inference

AML.T0010.name: ML Supply Chain Compromise
AML.T0010.description: Adversary compromises ML supply chain components

AML.T0043.name: Craft Adversarial Data
AML.T0043.description: Adversary crafts data to cause misclassification or misbehavior

AML.T0040.name: AI Model Inference API Access
AML.T0040.description: Adversary gains unauthorized access to model inference APIs
predicted_evolution: API key harvesting from agent contexts
model API abuse for training data extraction

AML.T0020.name: Poison Training Data
AML.T0020.description: Adversary introduces malicious data into training pipelines

AML.T0024.name: Exfiltration via ML Inference API
AML.T0024.description: Adversary uses ML inference to exfiltrate data

AML.T0044.name: Full ML Model Access
AML.T0044.description: Adversary gains complete access to model weights/architecture

AML.T0018.name: Backdoor ML Model
AML.T0018.description: Adversary embeds hidden behaviors in ML models

AML.T0046.name: Spamming ML System with Chaff Data
AML.T0046.description: Adversary overwhelms ML system with junk data

AML.T0052.000.name: Spearphishing via Social Engineering LLM
AML.T0052.000.description: Adversary uses social engineering to manipulate LLM-powered agents

AML.T0055.name: Unsecured Credentials
AML.T0055.description: Adversary accesses credentials stored insecurely in ML systems
predicted_evolution: API key extraction through context manipulation

AML.T0057.name: LLM Data Leakage
AML.T0057.description: LLM inadvertently reveals sensitive training or context data
predicted_evolution: context window data leakage across sessions

T1059.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
T1059.ai_context: Agent tool calls executing arbitrary commands

T1071.name: Application Layer Protocol
T1071.ai_context: Covert C2 through agent API calls

T1083.name: File and Directory Discovery
T1083.ai_context: Agent reconnaissance through file system skills

T1090.name: Proxy
T1090.ai_context: Using agent as proxy for network access
